failed_attempts:
simp [p, q]; linear_combination h₀
    · field_simp [h₁] at h₁; simp [p, q]; linear_combination h₁
    · field_simp [h₂] at h₂; simp [p, q]; linear_combination h₂
    · field_simp [h₃] at h₃; simp [p, q]; linear_combination h₃
  have h_eq : p = q := by
    apply sub_eq_zero.1; apply eq_of_degree_le_of_card_le_eval_eq (p := p - q) (q := 0) (n := 3)
    · apply degree_le_of_degree_lt; apply degree_sub_lt <;> (simp [p, q, coeff_mul, coeff_X_sub_C]; norm_num)
    · simp
    · simp; norm_num; exact h_roots
  have h_coeff : p.coeff 3 = q.coeff 3 := congr_arg (coeff · 3) h_eq
  simp [p, q, coeff_mul, coeff_X_sub_C] at h_coeff
  linarith

simp [r, q, p, Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_C_mul, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_X, Polynomial.coeff_C]
      split_ifs <;> (try norm_num; try ring; try (rename_i h; exfalso; linarith))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem, Finset.card_singleton] <;> try norm_num
      intros k hk; simp at hk
      cases hk with
      | inl h => subst h; simp [Polynomial.IsRoot, p]; field_simp [h₀]; ring
      | inr h => cases h with
        | inl h => subst h; simp [Polynomial.IsRoot, p]; field_simp [h₁]; ring
        | inr h => cases h with
          | inl h => subst h; simp [Polynomial.IsRoot, p]; field_simp [h₂]; ring
          | inr h => subst h; simp [Polynomial.IsRoot, p]; field_simp [h₃]; ring
  have h_coeff : r.coeff 3 = (q - p).coeff 3 := congr_arg (Polynomial.coeff · 3) h_eq
  simp [r, q, p, Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_C_mul, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_X, Polynomial.coeff_C] at h_coeff
  linarith

simp [P, Q, Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_X, Polynomial.coeff_C] <;>
    ring_nf <;> repeat (split_ifs with h <;> (try simp at h; try linarith)) <;> rfl
  have hPQ : P = Q := by
    refine Polynomial.eq_of_eval_eq_of_degree_le hdeg.1 hdeg.2 (s := {4, 16, 36, 64}) (by simp) ?_
    intro x hx; simp at hx; iterate 4 (rcases hx with rfl | hx)
    all_goals (dsimp [P, Q]; first | linear_combination -14175 * h₀ | linear_combination 31185 * h₁ | linear_combination -135135 * h₂ | linear_combination 2027025 * h₃)
  have h3 : P.coeff 3 = Q.coeff 3 := by rw [hPQ]
  simp [P, Q, Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_X, Polynomial.coeff_C] at h3
  ring_nf at h3
  linarith

simp [Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_X, Polynomial.coeff_C]; ring }
      refine Polynomial.degree_le_of_coeff_zero ?_ this
      dsimp [p, q]; compute_degree_le
    · intro r hr
      simp at hr; rcases hr with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
      all_goals { dsimp [p, q]; norm_num; field_simplify [h₀, h₁, h₂, h₃]; ring }
  have h_c3 : Polynomial.coeff p 3 = Polynomial.coeff q 3 := by rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← Polynomial.coeff_sub, h_pq, Polynomial.coeff_zero]
  dsimp [p, q] at h_c3; simp [Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_X, Polynomial.coeff_C] at h_c3
  ring_nf at h_c3; linarith

simp [p]; field_simp [h₀]; ring
    · simp [p]; field_simp [h₁]; ring
    · simp [p]; field_simp [h₂]; ring
    · simp [p]; field_simp [h₃]; ring
  have h_eq : p = q := by
    apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero; apply eq_zero_of_natDegree_le_of_eval_eq_zero (p - q) (n := 3)
    · apply natDegree_le_of_degree_le; apply degree_lt_of_coeff_zero (by norm_num : (p - q).degree ≤ 4)
      simp [p, q, coeff_mul_X_sub_C, coeff_sub, coeff_add, coeff_X, coeff_C]; ring
    · simp [h_eval, q]; intro k hk; rcases hk with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl <;> ring
  have h_p3 : p.coeff 3 = -84 - (x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + w^2) := by simp [p, coeff_mul_X_sub_C, coeff_sub, coeff_add, coeff_X, coeff_C]; ring
  have h_q3 : q.coeff 3 = -120 := by simp [q, coeff_mul_X_sub_C, coeff_sub, coeff_add, coeff_X, coeff_C]; ring
  linarith [congr_arg (coeff · 3) h_eq, h_p3, h_q3]

simp [p]; field_simp [this]; ring
    · have : x^2/15 + y^2/7 + z^2/(-9) + w^2/(-33) = 1 := by convert h₁ <;> norm_num
      simp [p]; field_simp [this]; ring
    · have : x^2/35 + y^2/27 + z^2/11 + w^2/(-13) = 1 := by convert h₂ <;> norm_num
      simp [p]; field_simp [this]; ring
    · have : x^2/63 + y^2/55 + z^2/39 + w^2/15 = 1 := by convert h₃ <;> norm_num
      simp [p]; field_simp [this]; ring
  have h_pq : p = q := by
    apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero; apply eq_zero_of_degree_lt_card_roots (s := {4, 16, 36, 64})
    · apply degree_lt_of_coeff_zero; intro i hi
      simp [p, q, coeff_sub, coeff_add, coeff_mul, coeff_X, coeff_C]
      if h : i = 4 then rw [h]; norm_num else have : i > 4 := by linarith; simp [coeff_eq_zero_of_degree_lt, this, degree_mul_le]
    · simp; norm_num
    · intro u hu; rcases (by simpa using hu : u=4 ∨ u=16 ∨ u=36 ∨ u=64) with (rfl|rfl|rfl|rfl) <;> (simp [p, q, hp])
  have h3 : p.coeff 3 = q.coeff 3 := by rw [h_pq]
  simp [p, q, coeff_sub, coeff_add, coeff_mul, coeff_X, coeff_C] at h3
  linarith [h3]
successful_attempts:
field_simp at h₀ h₁ h₂ h₃
  linarith
norm_num at h₀ h₁ h₂ h₃; field_simp at h₀ h₁ h₂ h₃; linarith
